text: Data created for Sub-Task 1 of the “Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation” task at Touché 2025. The dataset consists of samples of text taken from the well known MS MARCO V2.1 corpus. The samples were extracted based on the queries from the dataset Webis Generated Native Ads 2024. These samples were prepared to evaluate the performance of the approaches proposed to solve the task regarding the identification of native ads and evaluating the performance of information retrieval algorithms for this specific case.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
